name: nhentai
description: nhentai doujinshi/manga source. Contains EXPLICIT adult content - 18+ only. By using this addon, you confirm you are of legal age.

capabilities.notes: Fetches nhentai web pages through FlareSolverr (which egresses through the VPN) and parses the rendered HTML. The JSON API (nhentai.net/api) is Cloudflare/IP-blocked even via FlareSolverr, so this scrapes the rendered pages instead. The single 'nhentai.net' allowed domain covers the t./i. image CDNs via subdomain match.

results_per_page.label: Results Per Page
results_per_page.description: Number of results to fetch per search page
